work_unit: FE-H-001 SSRF via user-controlled LLM base_url (audit-2026-07-07-030 derived fix)
situation: moni-master frontend chatLoop.ts:62-79 forwards store.config.localBaseUrl (persisted to localStorage via zustand) straight into provider_override.base_url sent to /llm/chat backend. No scheme/host validation. Attacker who controls localStorage (XSS, shared device, prompt-injection-induced settings write) can set base_url to file:///etc/passwd, http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/, or internal service endpoint → backend fetches it server-side (SSRF).
action: Added validateBaseUrl() helper in chatLoop.ts that enforces: (1) only http/https schemes, (2) hostname is not localhost/::1/private-IP/link-local/metadata IP. Invalid URL returns undefined → override.base_url omitted → backend falls back to server-configured default. Non-blocking: legit users with public endpoints unaffected; malicious/poisoned values silently dropped.
outcome_evidence: Commit landed in auto/opt-frontend-1783366395, pushed to origin/auto/opt-frontend-1783366395. git diff shows +32/-1 lines adding validateBaseUrl + call site replacement at line 63. Worktree listed via opt-worktree.sh list.
next_suggestion: 派生下一个 pending finding FE-H-002 (prompt injection bypasses medium-risk tool confirm — DEFAULT_PERMISSIONS.allowMediumWithoutConfirm=true). 该修复在 aiStore.ts:82-86，独立文件不冲突。

audit_findings.finding: User-controlled localBaseUrl forwarded verbatim to backend provider_override.base_url without scheme/host validation → SSRF via poisoned localStorage
audit_findings.remediation: validateBaseUrl allowlist (http/https + public host) before assignment; drop invalid silently
